headline: HII’S Ingalls Shipbuilding Celebrates Apprentice School Graduates
summary: PASCAGOULA, Miss., March 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII’s (NYSE: HII) Ingalls Shipbuilding division celebrated 70 apprentice school graduates during a ceremony at the shipyard today. The event honored the newest class to complete the Department of Labor-registered program, which combines classroom instruction, paid on-the-job training and industry-recognized credentials. “The future of shipbuilding depends on skilled craftsmen and women who care deeply about their work, and today’s graduates s
